build.buildCommand: cd apps/coinet-platform 2>/dev/null || true; if [ ! -f package.json ]; then echo "ERROR: package.json not found in $PWD"; ls -la; exit 1; fi; if [ ! -f prisma/schema.prisma ]; then echo "ERROR: prisma/schema.prisma not found in $PWD"; ls -la prisma/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'prisma directory missing'; exit 1; fi; echo "Building from: $PWD"; npm install && (DATABASE_URL="postgresql://dummy:dummy@localhost:5432/dummy" npx prisma generate || echo 'Prisma generate skipped') && npm run build
